description: AI-assisted approach to building model-driven Power Apps using Copilot for data modeling, Plan Designer for app generation, and Generative Pages for custom React-based UI experiences within model-driven apps.
source_title: How to build Model-Driven Power Apps the Modern Way

key_topics.description: App components (forms, views, dashboards) connected to Dataverse tables
key_topics.critical_requirement: Data model in Dataverse is mandatory

key_topics.description: Natural language description of tables generates complete data model with relationships
key_topics.example: I need tables for tracking products and product related feedback

key_topics.description: AI agent suite that converts business problems into complete solutions
agents: Data Model Agent - designs Dataverse tables

key_topics.description: Natural language interaction with data within the app
types: Data Exploration Agent - natural language queries
Data Visualization Agent - automatic chart generation
key_topics.example: Show me all the high priority projects

key_topics.description: Custom React-based pages within model-driven apps
benefits: No JavaScript or PCF controls needed

key_topics.description: Automatic relationship creation via lookup columns

workflow_summary.step_1: Describe business problem to Plan Designer
workflow_summary.step_2: AI agents generate requirements, processes, data model
workflow_summary.step_5: Optional: Add generative pages for custom UI
workflow_summary.step_6: Optional: Enable in-app agents for natural language queries

terminology.model-driven-app: Power Apps approach using Dataverse tables with auto-generated forms/views
terminology.dataverse: Microsoft's cloud database service for Power Platform
terminology.generative-pages: AI-generated React pages within model-driven apps
terminology.plan-designer: AI-powered tool for creating apps from business descriptions
terminology.lookup-column: Column type that creates relationships between tables
terminology.in-app-agents: AI assistants embedded within Power Apps for user interaction
terminology.swim-lanes: Visual lanes in task boards representing different statuses
